This website uses cookies
We use cookies to personalise content and ads, to provide social media features and to analyse our traffic. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners who may combine it with other information that you’ve provided to them or that they’ve collected from your use of their services.

About
Cookies are small text files that can be used by websites to make a user's experience more efficient.  
  
The law states that we can store cookies on your device if they are strictly necessary for the operation of this site. For all other types of cookies we need your permission.  
  
This site uses different types of cookies. Some cookies are placed by third party services that appear on our pages.  
  
You can at any time change or withdraw your consent from the Cookie Declaration on our website.  
  
Learn more about who we are, how you can contact us and how we process personal data in our Privacy Policy.  
  
Please state your consent ID and date when you contact us regarding your consent.
**Do not sell or share my personal information**

![](https://pqshield.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/PQS_Semiconductors_Web.jpg)
# Semiconductors & Manufacturing
Semiconductors are a fundamental component of modern electronics and form the essential layer to production in complex global supply chains. Cryptographic methods in silicon must be able to authenticate hardware and components, prevent counterfeit parts from entering the supply chain, and ensure secure data exchange between suppliers, manufacturers and customers. Quantum attacks could lead to operational failures, security and safety concerns, and it’s important particularly for this foundational layer of manufacturing to transition to quantum resistance as soon as possible, in order to counter the threats of the next few years.
At PQShield, we specialize in transitioning components and systems to quantum-resistant cryptographic algorithms. Our security suite is designed to be optimizable for area, speed and performance, and is based on the latest NIST FIPS PQC standards.
[![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%207%2014%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)View Products![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%207%2014%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://pqshield.com/products/)
## How can PQShield help deliver quantum security?
[ ![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%20700%20420%22%3E%3C/svg%3E) Use Case Complete Post-quantum Processor FIPS-certified lattice-based and hash-based cryptography in a quantum coprocessor ](https://pqshield.com/use_cases/complete-post-quantum-processor/)
[ ![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%20700%20420%22%3E%3C/svg%3E) Use Case Secure boot Secure boot with PQShield's hash-based and lattice-based processor, and full root-of-trust subsystem. ](https://pqshield.com/use_cases/secure-boot/)
[ ![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%20700%20420%22%3E%3C/svg%3E) Use Case Optimal Performance with PQPlatform-SubSys Optimal performance of hardware as part of crypto-agility. Side channel protection as part of an easy-to-integrate, high-performing solution with PQPlatform-SubSys. ](https://pqshield.com/use_cases/high-performance-low-integration-2/)

PQShield comprises a world-class collaboration of post-quantum cryptographers, engineers, and operators. We’ve helped shape all of the first international PQC NIST standards, and we were the first cybersecurity company to develop quantum-safe cryptography on chips, in applications, and in the cloud.

About
Cookies are small text files that can be used by websites to make a user's experience more efficient.

The law states that we can store cookies on your device if they are strictly necessary for the operation of this site. For all other types of cookies we need your permission.

This site uses different types of cookies. Some cookies are placed by third party services that appear on our pages.

You can at any time change or withdraw your consent from the Cookie Declaration on our website.

Learn more about who we are, how you can contact us and how we process personal data in our Privacy Policy.

Please state your consent ID and date when you contact us regarding your consent.

Semiconductors & Manufacturing

Semiconductors are a fundamental component of modern electronics and form the essential layer to production in complex global supply chains. Cryptographic methods in silicon must be able to authenticate hardware and components, prevent counterfeit parts from entering the supply chain, and ensure secure data exchange between suppliers, manufacturers and customers. Quantum attacks could lead to operational failures, security and safety concerns, and it’s important particularly for this foundational layer of manufacturing to transition to quantum resistance as soon as possible, in order to counter the threats of the next few years.

At PQShield, we specialize in transitioning components and systems to quantum-resistant cryptographic algorithms. Our security suite is designed to be optimizable for area, speed and performance, and is based on the latest NIST FIPS PQC standards.

View Products

How can PQShield help deliver quantum security?

Use Case
Complete Post-quantum Processor
FIPS-certified lattice-based and hash-based cryptography in a quantum coprocessor
Use Case
Secure boot
Secure boot with PQShield's hash-based and lattice-based processor, and full root-of-trust subsystem.
Use Case
Optimal Performance with PQPlatform-SubSys
Optimal performance of hardware as part of crypto-agility. Side channel protection as part of an easy-to-integrate, high-performing solution with PQPlatform-SubSys.

Get in Touch

We can advise you on everything you need to know on post-quantum cryptography, and we’d be delighted to help, or discuss a partnership.

Your privacy: We will not store or use your details for any other purpose other than to correspond with you about this enquiry. You can read our privacy policy here.

Sign up for our newsletter

PQShield comprises a world-class collaboration of post-quantum cryptographers, engineers, and operators. We’ve helped shape all of the first international PQC NIST standards, and we were the first cybersecurity company to develop quantum-safe cryptography on chips, in applications, and in the cloud.
